title: Mysterious Uruguayan Beef Fritters
description: A bold, sour‑creamy fritter that marries Uruguayan beef with a tangy yogurt sauce, served hot from a deep fryer for an adventurous yet comforting treat.
instructions: In a bowl, combine the ground beef, almond flour, eggs, minced garlic, salt, pepper, and chopped parsley until well mixed.
Shape the mixture into small oval patties about 5 cm in diameter.
In a separate bowl, whisk together sour cream, yogurt, and a pinch of salt to make a tangy sauce.
Heat the olive oil in a deep fryer or deep pan until shimmering.
Fry the patties in batches for 4 to 5 minutes, flipping once, until golden brown and cooked through.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
Drizzle the prepared tangy sauce over the fritters or serve it on the side for dipping.
